subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of the Merciful! The Abha Beauty hath shone forth with His manifold names and attributes from the Dawning-Point of all desires
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای رحمان جمال ابهی از مطلع آمال بجمیع اسما و صفات اشراق فرمود و این قرن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
